creator: bsdpr@phoe.frmug.org
text: I eventually managed to compile lang/erlang on armv6 with the HiPE and NATIVE options using clan80. The build has terminated without errors, this again confirms an issue with base clang on 11.2. I launched the test suite to exercise the build, I suppose this could take some days to complete on a RPi2. Meanwhile I will update the proposed patch.
